titleStmt.title: SII 16.53: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 53. (A.R. No. 64 of 1915.) CHINNA AHŌBALAM, SIRVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up at the entrance into the Narasiṁhasvāmin shrine in the Narasiṁhasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1438 (current), Yuva, Pushya śu. 15, Friday, corresponding to 1515 A.D., December 21.

It records the conquests of the king as in No. 52 above. In addition, it states that the king having started out on a campaign of conquest to Kaliṅga visited Ahōbala enroute and made gifts of one thousand varāhas, a necklace, a ruby and diamond pendant inset with an emerald, a pair of bracelets set with rubies and a gold plate to the deity there. His queen also made a gift of a pendant. Further, the village Madūru in Chāṅgalamari-sīma was granted for worship and offerings to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śubhamastu . Ētatsurāsurādhiśa mauḷimālōpalālitaṁ .
Ahōbalasṛsiṁhasya dēvadēvasya śāsanaṁ . svastiśrīman ma
hārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mūrurāyalagaṁḍa Ari
rāyavibhāḍa Aṣṭadikkurāyamanōbhayaṁkara pū¨rva
dakṣiṇapaścimasamudrādhīśvara yavanarājyasthāpanācā
rya gajapatidaḷavibhāḍa śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrakṛṣṇadēva
mahārāyalu pū¨rvadigvijaya yātraku viccēsi vudaya
giri du¨rgamunnu sādhiṁci tirumalakātarāya mahā
pātṛniṁ baṭṭukoni vinikoṁḍa bellaṁkoṁḍa nāgā¨rjuni
koṁḍa Addaṁki Aṁmanabōlu taṁgēḍa kētavaraṁ mō
dalayana giridu¨rgasthaladu¨rgālunnu Ēkadhāṭini kaikoni koṁ
ḍavīṭiki vicēsi du¨rgaṁ cuṭuvārukoni naḍacapparālu veṭi
kōṭa paḍadōyiṁci nālugu dikkulānu laggalu viḍipiṁci du
¨rgamunu tīsukoni du¨rgaṁmīdanuṁnna pratāparudragajapatima
hārāyala komāruṁḍu vīrabhadrarāyaṁḍu komāra haṁvī
rapātṛni koḍuku naraharidēvu śrīnātharāju rāmarāju koḍu
ku lakṣmīpatirāju rācūri maluvakhānuṁḍu vuddaṁḍakhā
nuṁḍu janyavula kasavāpātṛṁḍu paścimabālacaṁdrama
hāpātṛṁḍu vīru mōdalayina pātrasāmaṁtulanu ma
nnevārini jīvagrāhaṁgāṁ baṭṭukoni vāriki Abayadānamu
nnu yicci dharaṇikōṭaku viccēsi Amarēśvaramahādēvuni saṁnidhini tu
lāpuruṣamahādānamunnu sēyanavadhariṁci tamadēvuḷa cētā
nu mahādānālu sēyiṁcanavadhariṁci tirigi vijayanagarāna
ku viccēsi ratnasiṁhāsanasthuṁḍai sāṁmrājyaṁsēstuṁnnu
mariṁni kaḷiṁgadēśadigvijayā¨rthamai viccēstuṁ
nnu Ahōbalānaku viccēsi dēvuni da¨rśiṁci svastiśrī ja
yābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1438 Agunēṭi yuva saṁvatsara puṣya śuddha 15 śu
kravārāna śrī Ahōbalēśvara dēvuniki kaṁṭhamāla 1 pa
ccaveṭṭina vajramāṇikyālapadakaṁ 1 māṇikyā
la kaḍiyāla jōḍu 1 paiṁḍipaḷyaṁ 1 kānika vē
yi varahāluṁnu tamadēvuḷu sama¨rpiṁcina padakaṁ
1 Iṁta vaṭuṁnu sama¨rpiṁci dēvaraku Amṛtapaḍi naivēdya
Aṁgaraṁgavaibhōgālaku cāṁgalamari sīmalō madū
ru Anē grāmamunnu sama¨rpiṁciri yi sēva [Ā]caṁdrā¨rka
stāyiAyi naḍavavalenani yiccina dha¨rmmaśāsanaṁ
maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī .
